DEPTH-DEMAND (triggered 28x): User expects output BEYOND the literal ask. Find adjacent improvements, non-obvious angles, and implicit subtasks.

ESCALATION-PATTERN: User escalated 219 times across sessions. The system consistently under-delivers on first pass. Default response should be at the depth of what the user typically escalates TO, not what they initially ask for.
SATISFACTION-TRIGGERS: User expressed satisfaction 143 times. Common context: when system executes autonomously, when output exceeds expectations, when system finds non-obvious angles.
